Welcome to Mina's webpage!

Poster presentation at AI retreat

November 14, 2021

I gave a poster presentation at the 2021 AI retreat held by the Artificial Intelligence Institute, Seoul National University.

Poster presentation at SfN 2021

November 9, 2021

I presented my thesis work, titled “Identifying unique neurocognitive mechanisms of food addiction and binge eating using longitudinal study design and computational modeling” at the 2021 Society for Neuroscience (SfN) Annual Meeting. I had orignially planned to attend the meeting in person, but it was canceled due to the COVID-19. However, I still enjoyed engaging in discussions with our group members and sharing our researche and motivaions through virtual poster session! :) If you have registered for the 2021 SfN, please check out the poster session! You can view my poster and also 5-minute recordings (Day two, P778 - Modeling and Behavior III #03)

Commencement :)

August 20, 2021

I have successfully received a Master’s degree in Clinical Psychology from Seoul National University :) Great thanks to my family!! I’m now starting my Ph.D :)

Got admission to PhD program

June 10, 2021

I have been admitted to the Ph.D. program at the Department of Psychology, Seoul National University. I am grateful that I could work/study/conduct research in my lab for the next three years and continue my ongoing research projects :) I wish and believe that my Ph.D. program will provide me with invaluable opportunities for personal and academic growth.

Working at the on-campus counseling center

January 2, 2021

Starting this January, I have begun working at the on-campus counseling center at Seoul National University, known as the “Center for Campus Life &amp; Culture”. As a graduate student majoring in clinical psychology, this is a fantastic opportunity for me to gain experience in real clinical settings and apply what I have learned in lectures so far. From January to June, I will be conducting intake interviews on a weekly basis. Additionally, I will be conducting 1:1 counseling sessions!
